product.name: ArGiyim Knit Knife Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Cut-proof knit fabric from p-aramid. Bomb and nail proof woven fabrics from Pa6.6
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 100% p-Aramid Cut Proof, Jersey Knit Fabric
descriptions: 100% p-Aramid jersey knit fabric for motorcyclist linings.
ArGiyim Knit Knife Pro can also be used for cut proof gloves.
250 g/m², 100% p-Aramid Cut Proof, Jersey Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: 100% p-Aramid jersey knit fabric for motorcyclist linings.
matches.rationale: Explicitly stated as a lining material for motorcyclist apparel.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Aramid cut-resistant fabric could theoretically be used in tactical gear, but no military or uniformed-service use is stated.
